# Mindful QALB — AI Content Summary
# https://www.mindfulqalb.com/llms.txt

> Mindful QALB is an online mental health practice run by Aqsa Khatib,
> a licensed Counseling Psychologist (Master's in Counseling Psychology,
> CBT certified, NLP Practitioner, EFT & TFT Tapping, Trauma-Informed Care,
> Psycho-oncology, 3,000+ clinical hours). Services include individual therapy,
> couples therapy, and mental health support groups. Based in Karnataka, India.
> Clients served worldwide including NRIs. Languages: English, Urdu.

## Services
- Individual therapy: Chat ₹499 / Audio ₹899 / Video ₹1,299 per session
- Couples therapy: Video 90 min ₹1,999
- Free 15-minute initial consultation

## Key Modalities
CBT (Cognitive Behavioural Therapy), ACT (Acceptance & Commitment Therapy),
Gestalt Therapy, Solution-Focused Therapy, NLP, EFT, TFT Tapping,
Trauma-Informed Care, Psycho-oncology, Family & Couple Therapy

## Conditions Treated
Anxiety, depression, OCD, ADHD, PTSD, burnout, grief, relationship difficulties,
self-esteem issues, life transitions, career stress, couples conflict

## Credentials
- Master's in Counseling Psychology
- CBT Certification
- NLP Practitioner
- EFT & TFT Tapping
- Trauma-Informed Care
- Psycho-oncology training
- Featured in Inquilab Newspaper
- International webinar presenter (Berlin University)
- Published author on VHealthy platform
